note: Product data roadmap for buyer, renter, and investor decisions. Live listing data is refreshed locally; official data modules should be automated next.

modules.label: Listing history
modules.whyImportant: First-seen, last-seen, price-change, image-change, and removed-listing signals let users find fresh opportunities and avoid stale posts.
modules.chart: New vs seen-again listings, price changes, removed candidates
modules.nextStep: Run the refresh daily and preserve at least 90 days of history.

modules.label: Rent per square foot
modules.whyImportant: Monthly rent alone hides tiny units. Rent per square foot makes compact, expensive, and better-value units easier to compare.
modules.chart: Rent per sq ft by budget bucket and listing
modules.nextStep: Split saleable area and gross area so users know whether comparisons are apples-to-apples.

modules.label: RVD rental index
modules.whyImportant: A shortlist can be noisy. The official rental index shows whether the wider rental market is rising, flat, or weakening.
modules.chart: Private domestic rental index over time
modules.currentSource: Rating and Valuation Department Property Market Statistics
modules.nextStep: Download or scrape the RVD table monthly and store a normalized JSON series.

modules.label: RVD price index
modules.whyImportant: Buyers and investors need price trend context before trusting a listing price or sales comp.
modules.chart: Private domestic price index over time
modules.currentSource: Rating and Valuation Department Property Market Statistics
modules.nextStep: Add district/class filters where official table granularity supports it.

modules.label: Gross and net yield
modules.whyImportant: Target ROI turns a vague property search into a required monthly rent and cost-adjusted return test.
modules.chart: Target rent vs actual rent, gross yield, net yield after costs
modules.currentSource: User inputs plus live rent shortlist
modules.nextStep: Add management fee, rates, vacancy, agency fee, mortgage interest, and stamp duty.

modules.label: Land Registry transactions
modules.whyImportant: Transaction volume shows market liquidity. Thin volume makes valuation and exit harder.
modules.currentSource: Hong Kong Land Registry monthly statistics
modules.nextStep: Normalize monthly sale/purchase statistics and show the latest 12-month trend.

modules.label: Stamp duty and cash needed
modules.whyImportant: Hong Kong buying decisions can fail on cash needed at completion, not just headline price.
modules.chart: Purchase price to stamp duty and upfront cash
modules.currentSource: Inland Revenue Department stamp duty guidance
modules.nextStep: Implement a conservative calculator and label it as an estimate.

modules.label: Mortgage payment and LTV
modules.whyImportant: Monthly payment, loan-to-value, down payment, and interest sensitivity determine whether a purchase is realistic.
modules.chart: Monthly repayment vs rate, down payment, stress buffer
modules.currentSource: HKMA property lending guidance plus lender rate inputs
modules.nextStep: Add user-selectable rate, term, LTV, and repayment chart.

modules.label: Supply, completions, vacancy
modules.whyImportant: New supply and vacancy pressure can explain why rents or prices may weaken in a district or property class.
modules.chart: Completions, stock, vacancy by year/property class
modules.currentSource: RVD Hong Kong Property Review and market statistics
modules.nextStep: Start with territory-wide private domestic tables, then add district detail if available.

modules.label: MTR and commute distance
modules.whyImportant: Transport access affects renter demand, resale liquidity, and daily quality of life.
modules.chart: Distance bands to MTR and key amenities
modules.currentSource: Geocoding plus OpenStreetMap or manual station coordinates
modules.nextStep: Geocode listing buildings and compute distance to nearest station.
